subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Blessed Beauty! Thy letter was received and became a source of joy and gladness, for it bore testimony to this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال مبارک نامه شما رسید و سبب فرح و سرور گردید زیرا دلیل بر آن بود
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant
